subject: It's no wonder

body:
The Koch brothers alone have already put millions on this race. |
---

| | Peter -- Throughout the 2012 Senate election, national Republicans, the Koch brothers, and their special interest cronies spent over $12 million attacking Joe. But that didn't work -- so this time, Republican megadonors are going to dig even deeper. They're going to turn Indiana into one of the most expensive battlegrounds in the country.

**_The Koch brothers alone have already put millions on this race._**

That's an early sign that the Republican dark money machine will spend _tens of millions of dollars_ trying to defeat Joe before this election is said and done. **Will you donate to help us hit our 300 supporter end-of-month goal and fight back?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: The White House
subject: America First
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d21d466311c7c81bf5dfa5c6df4a6ed518739f75509ab73f972c42fb88f3a88cdf6c2f122e3034fe20e268c725ac6d94e366b754c67b7ead

Unleashing the Potential of Businesses

Minority-owned businesses are a bedrock of the American economy and will be a critical component in the country’s new period of economic revival. The Trump Administration is committed to creating a business climate in which minority business enterprises can thrive and expand. The Unified Framework for Tax Reform, supported by President Donald J. Trump, cuts taxes and lowers the cost of tax compliance to unleash the potential of all businesses.

Watch
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d21d466311c7c81b6d7098fadcf60951e9ddc3138347f13b33fd7f45fd2f83745d1a38995b13ec48161b930fc365ec4bef634f0116345e83
here to learn more about how the Unified Framework for Tax Reform addresses the interests of minority business owners.

Ivanka Talks Tax Interests of American Families

Last week, Advisor Ivanka Trump appeared alongside Senate and House Republicans on Capitol Hill to discuss the importance of an enhanced child tax credit to promote the wellbeing of American families. As part of the Administration's push for Tax Reform, Ivanka, in coordination with the National Economic Council, Office of Legislative Affairs, and Treasury, has been working on an expansion of the child tax credit as it is an essential part of ensuring a middle class tax cut. It will put more money back in American's pockets, empowering them to make decisions that work best for their individual families.

Watch highlights
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d21d466311c7c81b05327b2aa1b7e5ae7d1193a44752ce680e8aa98c8c62ec8f354f05c035b96097fdfe10cedc455267a96542f776a44ea1
here.

White House Halloween

Last night, the White House welcomed local students and families from over 20 local schools and community groups, as well as military families, to a Halloween celebration on the South Lawn. Guests were treated to festive décor, a photo op, treats from the President and First Lady, and sugar cookies from the White House Executive Pastry Chef.

See more from the White House’s Halloween
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d21d466311c7c81bef7a2044df14f8c6e58623f8f03adde37775c5826114f2762e778045597e02b6ba97a2cfef9cc3d1e613b4b1fd740fda
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump host Halloween at the White House | October 30, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Keegan Barber)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump will participate in a tax reform industry meeting in the Roosevelt Room. Later, the President will participate in a legislative foreign policy lunch, followed by a meeting with the Speaker of the House of Representatives Paul Ryan.

This afternoon, Vice President Pence is at the U.S. Capitol to participate in a series of meetings with lawmakers and attend the Senate Republican Policy Luncheon. Afterwards, the Vice President will participate in a meeting with House GOP committee chairs.

COMING UP

Later this week, President Trump will depart for Asia, his fourth international trip as President.

Contact the White House |

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Important Virginia Election is Only a Week Away!
body:
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171031_va_7db&n=1)
Hey Peter,
I’m sending you a quick note to remind you of the elections happening next week.
As a resident of Virginia, you have the opportunity on **Tuesday, November 7th** to select the next Governor of Virginia along with other representatives.
When elections roll around I can’t help but think about the incredible opportunity we have as Christians to affect the welfare of the city and nation in which we live (Jeremiah 29:7). How cool would it be if the Christians in your community, in your state, seized the opportunity to select God-fearing leaders who would enact laws and policy that align with scripture – all for a more prosperous society?
I’ll send you one more reminder the day before the election to let you know where to vote; but first I just want to make sure you have [read the information on the candidates before you fill out your ballot.](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fthink%2Ffor-voters%2Fva%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171031_va_7db&n=2)
I’m eager to see Christians take Biblical values into voting booths in Virginia and across the country on Election Day. Together, we can make a lasting difference!
**United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates

subject: Deadline tonight: Help close the fundraising gap, Derek
body:
Step up before tonight's deadline.

**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tonight's end-of-month deadline to help Democrats win in all 50 states.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052393e/4067b0a/47740a02b/7e664682/2622465044/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171031_ems_nd&source=em_20171031_ems_nd&refcode=em_20171031_ems_nd")**

By now you've either seen or heard the reports, Derek. Last month, Republicans outspent us and outraised us again.

That's no surprise. The Republican Party is backed by the ultra-wealthy and corporate interests -- and they know who's working to give them a big tax cut.

And that's why I love the Democratic Party and helping raise money to get Democrats elected -- because Democrats fight for the people who need champions, not the people who write checks.

That makes it harder at fundraising deadlines like this one tonight, but it's the way we do business. It's also why I need to ask for your support right now if you're committed to electing Democrats, from school board to the Oval Office, to make sure that we're doing whatever we can to win in 2017, 2018, and beyond.

body:

| |
---
| **"Candidates Are Jumping at the Chance to Unseat Debbie Wasserman Schultz."**
\-- _The Observer_ , 08/2017 They weren't kidding about this. Debbie has four opponents so far -- which maybe isn't that alarming on its own. But her opponents have already raised six figures. Opponents are one thing. Opponents with money are another. **And when you have opponents with money on the attack, the alarm bells go off.** [_**We are about $1,400 short of our $25,000 October goal -- and we cannot afford to fall behind. Can you rush in a contribution before it's too late?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e1e/622b7b5b/6fef497/307bae3f/568787704/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171028?refcode=dwse171028_m&recurring=true&amount=5") You have to remember -- these four opponents aren't the only forces Debbie is up against. She's an incredibly outspoken opponent of the Trump administration. President Trump and his bully squad never miss a chance to attack her. And special interest groups have become major power players in elections since _Citizens United_. They could add attacks (and money) to this race at any time. They've done it before. **Debbie's tough, but she can't stand up to all of that on her own.** She needs us. And we need to come through. [_**Don't wait until it's too late -- give what you can right now. Even $3 or $5 will go a long way.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e1e/622b7b5b/6fef497/307bae3f/568787704/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171028?refcode=dwse171028_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thanks! subject: I'm spooked 👻🎃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
It's Halloween eve and I'm spooked. |
---

| | | **[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24b8/7377f838/350adaec/51fbb3fa/829745127/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?refcode=20171031nda&amount=10")**
---
Peter,

It's Halloween and I'm spooked. Why? Because I just took a look at our numbers, and as it stands, we're still 143 supporters away from hitting our October goal.

You may be wondering why this goal matters so much. Here's why: In a race as competitive as Joe's, we need to hit _every single monthly goal_ to be sure we have the resources it will take to go up against well-funded special interests.

**So hitting today's goal is a very big deal. Can you help us get there by contributing a couple of bucks right now?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24b8/7377f838/350adaec/51fbb3f5/829745127/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20171031nda&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24b8/7377f838/350adaec/51fbb3f4/829745127/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20171031nda&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24b8/7377f838/350adaec/51fbb3f7/829745127/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20171031nda&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24b8/7377f838/350adaec/51fbb3f6/829745127/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20171031nda&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24b8/7377f838/350adaec/51fbb3f1/829745127/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20171031nda")**
**Here 's the other thing that spooks me: The thought of a U.S. Senate without Joe Donnelly.**

We've always known that Joe will stand up for the little guy, regular people like you and me. But the GOP and their special interest allies want to replace him with someone who only cares about what millionaires and big corporations want. That's why they keep attacking him for doing common-sense things, like voting to save Americans' health care and fighting back against policies that hurt Hoosiers.

Joe can take the attacks -- he's tough. But even the toughest guy in the Senate needs a strong team to stand with him. **Peter, Joe and I are depending on you to be a part of that team.**

**Joe won his 2012 race because of overwhelming grassroots support -- and we need to recreate that again this year.[Will you pitch in $5 to help us hit our goal, end the month strong, and re-elect Joe?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24b8/7377f838/350adaec/51fbb3fa/829745127/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?refcode=20171031nda&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Kelly

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Under Trump, progress at the state level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
President Trump and his allies have had a busy month ramming through their terrible agenda.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTIyNTMwMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MjY0ODk4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, Every month, every week, every day -- sometimes it feels like every hour -- we're reminded of the dysfunctional and dangerous administration in D.C. Here are just a few examples from October:
* Yesterday, Trump's former campaign chief Paul Manafort was indicted for tax fraud and money laundering.
* Trump and his EPA Administrator scrapped the Clean Power Plan, a critical part of President Obama's strong legacy to combat climate change.
* Secretary DeVos came to Washington, but instead of meeting with our kids, teachers, and parents, she held a fundraiser for a right-wing think tank.

I'm fighting, not just to stop Donald Trump's terrible agenda, but to improve the lives of people in my state and my country. [**To do it, we need to continue to build our movement 's grassroots strength -- be a part of this movement by donating $5 today ahead of our end-of-month deadline. **](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIyNTMwMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MjY0ODk4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Right now, strong leadership at the state level is more important than ever. In fact, it is the only place we are making real progress as a nation. In Washington we promote world-class public schools. We fight bigoted travel bans and we embrace the diversity that has made America the greatest nation on earth. We lead the fight combatting climate change and support common sense gun safety. We pass family leave and create a stable thriving economy for our people. One of the best ways you can stand up against Donald Trump is by supporting progress at the state level. I'm proud of what we're doing in Washington; it's a model for the nation. I hope I can count on your continued support as we do this critical work. [**There 's a lot of work ahead for us and less than a day until our end-of-month deadline. Chip in $5 now -- I so appreciate your support. **](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIyNTMwMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MjY0ODk4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTIyNTMwMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MjY0ODk4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Hello,
Far-right Republicans just launched a direct threat to woman leaders like Senators Elizabeth Warren, Claire McCaskill, and Tammy Baldwin.
_POLITICO_ is calling the new group funded by wealthy Republican elites like Betsy DeVos a "conservative counterweight" to Democratic groups like the Women's Senate Network.
This group has the potential to really hurt the TEN Democratic woman Senators up for re-election in 2018, and our women are going to need help.
[**Will you give $3 or more to help us raise $5,000 for the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 's Women's Senate Network before tonight's October fundraising deadline? **](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde42/2a380d31/20fbc3f/fe121a/299201165/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193c24iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MTAzMV9XU04xX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_wsn?refcode=e20171031_WSN1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
We won't mince words: 2018 is going to be a tough year for Democrats. But we also know that Democratic women are some of the most persistent, resilient leaders we have.
That's why the DSCC's Women's Senate Network is ramping up its 2018 efforts to elect smart, tough, and experienced candidates to fight for what's right -- who understand that women are not pre-existing conditions, that we deserve equal pay, and that access to birth control and reproductive health services are basic health care.
With Republicans working overtime to roll back the progress we've made for women and families, we need to do more than just keep each and every Democratic woman we have in the Senate - we need to add to our ranks.
[**If electing Democratic women sounds like a fight that you want to be part of (and it should!), please support this effort by giving $3 or as much as you can now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde42/2a380d31/20fbc3f/fe121a/299201165/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193c24iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MTAzMV9XU04xX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_wsn?refcode=e20171031_WSN1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

Team Maggie

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: FWD: Bring it home
body:
#
Friends -
When we first sent out this email in March, announcing our campaign for Governor of Florida, some news outlets reported our race as an "uphill battle" and questioned our ability to build name recognition across the state.
This weekend, we saw exactly what is possible when we come together and run a people-powered campaign. As Politico's Marc Caputo said, "judging by applause, [we] score[d] best with the crowd of a few hundred at Fla Dems gubernatorial forum."
[**Help us keep up this incredible momentum by chipping in before our end-of-month deadline tonight, and together, we will rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/240310b4/3289497965/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171031-am")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
****[DONATE $10](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/240310b7/3289497965/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-oct2017?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em20171031-amexpress_10")****
**[DONATE $20.18](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/240310b6/3289497965/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-oct2017?express_lane=true&amount=20.18&refcode=em20171031-amexpress_20.18")**
**[DONATE $50](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/24031149/3289497965/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-oct2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20171031-amexpress_50")**
**[DONATE $100](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/24031148/3289497965/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-oct2017?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20171031-amexpress_100")**
After months of running as the underdogs in the race, the tides are finally starting to turn. Our hard work is paying off -- and as long as we keep it up, we will be unstoppable in both the primary and the general elections.
This is our opportunity to prove it's possible to win a campaign on our progressive values, instead of relying on candidates with a famous last name or the ability to self fund. Let's win this together.
Bring it home,
Andrew

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Andrew Gillum** <info@andrewgillum.com>
Date: Wed, Mar 1, 2017
Subject: Bring it home

Friends -
Growing up, my grandmother always told us to go to school, mind our teachers, get our lesson, and bring that education home - for our brothers, our baby sister, and the kids in our neighborhood.
She wanted us to know we were responsible for more than ourselves -- we are also responsible for our family and our neighborhood, and everyone around us.
My grandmother knew then what I know now -- that if we were going to get anywhere, we would get there together. And that's why I'm coming to you today, with a humble heart and a whole lot of hope, as we launch this campaign for Governor of Florida. Because I know that our only path to victory is one we're willing to travel together.
**[**Join our people powered campaign now, and help us bring it home for Florida.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/240310b4/3289497965/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171031-am")**
Like so many of you, I am here today because of the very policies Republicans say are "destroying" our great state of Florida. I grew up on food stamps in Miami and Gainesville. My parents weren't college educated, but they both worked hard: my mother as a bus driver and my father as a construction worker. As Governor, I will work to create jobs that pay a living wage on every rung of the income ladder.
Our family struggled with being cash poor, but I still grew up rich in opportunity. Though the public schools I attended weren't always in the best part of town, they were always filled with the best teachers. I wouldn't be writing you today as a candidate for Governor of Florida had it not been for the encouragement and help I received from Ms. Alexandria at Westwood Middle School and Mrs. Awbrey at Gainesville High School. **They went above and beyond the requirements of their job, like so many teachers do, to ensure that I became the first person in my family to graduate college.**
But I knew it wasn't enough for me to become the first in my family to go to college -- it was my duty to make sure I wasn't the last. The Democratic Party and progressive philosophy created a way up and a way out for even families like mine, and so when I began my career in public service at just 23 years old, I did so as a progressive Democrat. My experiences reflected those of average, everyday Floridians. And I knew those people deserved a champion.
For me, being a Democrat has always been about welcoming folks just as they are. This was the party that advocated for my parents growing up, that didn't demonize them or label them as lazy. Instead, they fought for progress for all of us. And that's what I've worked to do in my time on the Tallahassee City Council and as Mayor of Tallahassee.
When marriage equality was won at the Federal level and we had Florida county after county after county saying that they would no longer issue marriage licenses to anybody, just so they didn't have to do it for gay couples. So I welcomed couples to our great city of Tallahassee to celebrate their love and commitment to one another with marriage.
When President Trump's executive order targeted immigrants in our cities, I protested loudly and proudly, and fought to stop him from tearing these families apart. This concept of having to choose between security and compassion is absolutely false. We can have both, and we must fight for both.
In fact, I have worked tirelessly to make Tallahassee a safe haven for all -- and I have done so without resorting to irrational discrimination. When I refused to repeal ordinances that prevent shooting guns in a public park, the gun lobby sued me. They thought they could intimidate me with threats of personal fines, with two years of litigation, and with attacks from right-wing interest groups. **They were wrong. Just last month, we won the battle to keep our parks safe.**
My pastor talks about it in the terms of being the thermostat versus the thermometer. There are enough people who are prepared to take the temperature. There are not enough people who are willing to set it. I think I've demonstrated up to this point that I've never had to take the temperature in order to do the right thing.
I believe we are at a time in our state and our nation's history that requires not just people who quietly agree on these critical issues we are facing, but people who are going to be champions, who will get out and lead on them.
That's why I'm asking you to join together with us from the very beginning, to help us prove that we have that power, that hope, and that determination to rebuild this state into one that works for all of us, no matter what we look like, where we come from, what we believe, or whom we love.
**[**Let us know if you 'll be joining together with us for this historic campaign right here and right now.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/240310b4/3289497965/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171031-am")**
Thank you for being a part of this journey. I look forward to traveling the state and meeting with you and the rest of the team in the coming weeks.
Bring it home,
Mayor Andrew Gillum
Candidate for Florida Governor

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/240310b4/3289497965/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171031-am")****

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/2403114b/3289497965/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/2403114a/3289497965/VEsHBQ/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3278/9e00690/4e669f57/2403114d/3289497965/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

body:
When more indictments come for Trump and his allies, we need to be ready
#
Friends,
When more indictments come for Trump and his allies, we need to be ready to seize the momentum and build our grassroots movement. This is our opportunity to stand united and demand a government that works for all people, not a small number of wealthy citizens (American or otherwise).
[**Contribute to Our Revolution today and help us take the power back from the millionaires, billionaires, and Russian influence over our politics.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae9d/bed43eb/136f5bb0/75ff2677/4192293352/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em171031-full&noskip=true")
We have already won some major victories this year. Randall Woodfin was elected mayor of Birmingham, Alabama, and Chokwe Lumumba was elected mayor of Jackson, Mississippi. Larry Krasner won a tough Democratic primary for Philadelphia District Attorney and is the favorite in next Tuesday's general election. Paul Feeney, Christine Pellegrino, Monica Kurth, and Stephanie Hansen were elected to their state legislatures. We elected city councilors khalid kamau, John Courage, Gil Cedillo, and Ali Dieng, and school board members Natalie Vowell, Valdez Bravo, Gina Perez, and Rita Moore.
With 58 candidates and a ballot initiative up for election one week from today, we have no time to lose. We need to act now if we are going to give voters a viable alternative to business-as-usual, status quo politics.
[**Make a contribution to Our Revolution and help us continue to build the political revolution from the grassroots.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae9d/bed43eb/136f5bb0/75ff2677/4192293352/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em171031-full&noskip=true")
Your leadership in this movement is critical. Our Revolution would not be possible without your support.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: This will be quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
If we're going to win this thing, it has to be together. |
---

| | Peter -- This will be quick. My team tells me we're still 27 donations short of our October goal. And there are only a few hours left until the midnight deadline. So I'm reaching out to folks like you, who haven't gotten a chance to chip in yet.

Look, I know I'm in a tough race. Top Republican officials have threatened to campaign against me. Their big-money allies are attacking me with ads.

But I don't work for them. I work for you. Threatening me is like waving a red flag in front of a bull. I won't be swayed. The fact that they're attacking me for standing up for Hoosiers only makes me want to work even harder.

If we're going to win this thing, it has to be together. I need you on my side. That's why I'm asking: **Can you pitch in $5 before the midnight deadline?**

You can donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2483/7377f838/35002779/51fbb098/3270053955/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?refcode=20171031.2ndin&amount=10")**

Thank you,
Joe
